sentences.sentence: Fresh produce is on your left.
Baskets are by the front door.
Please check the dates on dairy items.
We restock the bakery section every morning before opening.
Sale items are marked with a bright yellow tag near the shelf price.
The deli counter can slice meats and cheeses to order for you.
If you cannot find something, check the directory posted at the end of each aisle.
Chop the tomatoes and cucumbers into small cubes.
Add a handful of your favorite nuts for extra crunch.
Drizzle your dressing evenly over the whole bowl.
Toss everything gently so the leaves do not bruise.
Before you serve it, taste a little and adjust the salt if needed.
